entry.title: Re: Community Member Spotlight: Roberta Fernandes - February 2025 Edition

entry.title: Re: CDS Views for Price Simulation of Customer/Material C...
entry.content:
There is no CDS for Your requirements.

Please try API

https://api.sap.com/api/MaintenanceLookupTableDataService/overview

entry.title: Re: Error Message - Server is busy
entry.content:
That can happen when the printer is "busy" processing multiple print jobs. Often see this with older printer drivers.

What printer are they using?

how many reports is the user trying to print?

are they large report, multiple pages or single pages etc.?

Do you have any logging built into your app to get details?

entry.title: Blog series on my CPI + Camel learning journey
entry.content:
Intro / Motivation

Disclaimer: This series is written by a person unrelated to camel or even java world beforehand. Please, do NOT expect proficiency in EAI, EIP, OSGI or even Spring basics. There is a much better  way of testing proper camel routes natively. And most likely cap java would have been a better stack for the tool I am presenting.

So, finally I got involved in some project where I would touch CPI (or Integration Suite as they call it now).

And as a not at all fan of low-code tools I instantly felt not at all at home there (who would have thought).

Cuz as a developer I am used to having all my artifacts editable in convenient IDE and then stored in VCS (to track changes properly), to being able to run the stuff locally in order to debug and test it, and also to automate the latter becuase I am rather lazy person (but we call it Quality to trick clients into paying for that).

And as you might know, this is not something you have in CPI out of the box (wysiwyg iflow editor without undo feature? yeah, okay...).

Luckily though, there are some apis (public and not so much), with help of which you can build tools yourself.

And I was actually rather surprised not to discover those tools as some open-source projects, so I decided to try creating one for myself using sap cap (and some vanilla nodejs stuff).

So, this blog series is my take on working with cpi locally and learning camel (but avoiding writing Java code) in the meantime.

 

How we typically test stuff

As a quick reminder though, it makes sense to point out that in order to be able to test something, you need to start writing testable code.

And in case of CPI it means some iflow steps need to be modelled differently - as external rather than embedded into iflow, like script steps or message mappings - because then osgi magic would allow us to run bundles and connect them (locally we only have blueprint deployed).

And then only thing we need is to be able to isolate and run our stuff.

Preferably on local machine.

This figure above is taken from nice open sap course on abap unit testing to sum it all up

Btw, course was not migrated after they killed it, but who needs testing anyway..

 

Series structure or plans

Currently I have at least these 3 parts to follow up in mind (in March I guess) with approximate agendas:

  • About the tool from the technical perspective and Intended workflow (mention other tools for groovy scripting/xslt) + project setup + git
  • Camel / karaf / osgi basics + comparing cpi flows from guidelines to camel routes and playing with them
  • More stuff about approach to testing (manual and automated) and isolation (pollenrich vs external systems etc)

 

Demo time

And finally, there's the teaser.

Thanks for reading and stay tuned!

00:00 pt1: Initial setup and remote webshell

06:06 pt2: Karaf setup and local webshell

09:46 pt3.1: Deploy and prepare sample flows from guidelines (cpi + local)

13:27 pt3.2: Manual testing of sample flows with ui

19:23 pt3.3 Running automated test for a flow

21:38 Outro (git sync feature was not mentioned, but will be covered in next posts)

entry.title: Unable to download Desktop Agent for SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am currently working on a DOX (Document information extraction) Bot project in SAP Build Process Automation; and I am following the tutorial (sap-tutorials/sap-build-process-automation) about "Install and Set Up Desktop Agent 3" from @pbujnicka. I followed the documentation to create the user in RBSC portal, having an S-number user in SAP BTP trial cockpit, and set up the Secret ID.

But when I go to the Control Tower, and then to the Download Page, the box with the droplist to download the Agent installation file does not appear (image attached). Note: The role ProcessAutomationAdmin is already assigned to the user, and the technical user is created, and Secret ID generated and in Status: "Valid".

There is no error message and nothing to know what is going wrong.

@peterengel @SAPSupport @pbujnicka 

Please let me know, if I am missing out on anything or what is the cause of this problem and of course how can I fix it.

Thank you in advance,

Best Regards,

Rosa.

entry.title: Re: 在启用高级评估之后，计提坏账准备时，需要勾选客户主数据中的信用参数文件的风险类，导致必须启用信用额度；不勾...
entry.content: 谢谢指导

entry.title: 在执行付款策略后，形成清算的银行科目后，后续如果过过账到总账对账单中，或者说导入对账项目后，如何形成冲销清算科目
entry.content: # SAP S/4HANA Cloud# SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public# SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition# SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance,#，1.在执行付款策略后，形成清算的银行科目后即借：应付账款 贷：银行清算科目11001020，后续如果过过账到总账对账单中，或者说导入对账项目后，如何形成冲销清算科目即将11001000月11001020的冲销，导入对账单后的过账未能自动冲销银行清算科目；2.相关实施未执行J78，能否实现上述基本功能；3.是否有先关Scope-item银行管理和对账单相关的，

entry.title: Re: Change Rate Italy Bank
entry.content:
You can create a RFC in SM59

define the SSL certificate in security options section 

Download the certificate from https://tassidicambio.bancaditalia.it/

Import the certificate in strust

Test RFC conection and you will see all exchange rates from banca de italia

You can base on the standar program RFIMPNBS to copy it and upload the exchgange rates from this source.

Share if you reach it.

Regards,

Gerardo

entry.title: Re: 银行清算科目如何结转至银行主科目?

entry.title: Re: I created the SAP GUI AI Agent
entry.content:
Hi,

Thanks for your patience. I'm currently recording an episode where I dive into some architecture and code. I expect to wrap it up by tomorrow, so it should be published early next week. Apart from the video, I will also try to write a few words about it.

BR

entry.title: Re: Unable to download WSDL file from a webservice
entry.content:
Hello Shiva,

I am new to SAP, and after many years of your issue, I got the same one. 
What I did to solve the error was to deploy the business configuration. But that didn't worked out and got another error saying the solution is locked. 
So I activated all the bo and ui components in the solution and tried deploying again. Even this time, I got the same error saying the solution is locked. But, when I tried to download the file, I was successful. 

Hope this helps someone.

Regards,

Nag.

The example on the Accelerator Hub does not have a Body.

SAP Business Accelerator Hub

Many thanks 🙂

entry.title: 'Key "ID" is missing for entity "ProcessorService.Incidents"' error
entry.content:
"I was following the 'Enable draft with @odata.draft.enabled' section of https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/add-fiori-elements-uis.html, and after adding 'annotate ProcessorService.Incidents with @odata.draft.enabled;' to the srv/services.cds file, I'm getting an error in the browser saying 'Key "ID" is missing for entity "ProcessorService.Incidents"'. Does anyone know what the problem is?

The Incidents entity is currently as follows (not modified from the manual):

 

entity Incidents : cuid, managed {  
customer     : Association to Customers;
title        : String  @title : 'Title';
urgency        : Association to Urgency default 'M';
status         : Association to Status default 'N';
conversation  : Composition of many {
    key ID    : UUID;
    timestamp : type of managed:createdAt;
    author    : type of managed:createdBy;
    message   : String;
};
}

entry.title: Re: Enterprise Management Layer for SAP S/4HANA – What’s New – Release 2023
entry.content:
Hi Petra,

currently we are having S4HANA 2022 system with EML version 2022.

I have few question on EML version upgrade point of view .
Can we upgrade/Update the EML version to EML 2023  without upgrading the whole system(S4HANA)?
If yes then How can we achieve this? 
If No and S4HANA upgrade is the only option to have EML 2023 , then what need to be done/Taken care after the upgrade? as my understanding is upgrade would “only” provide the functionality, not the configuration.

Could you please advice as we are currently doing for future roadmap planning .

entry.title: Re: When I move to Quality system from Dev my BW Query OD...
entry.content: The manual of Sandra_Rosi is one of the ways. Easier is (re)using FM RSEQ_NAT_GENERATION. There you place the query technical name, tr package and tr request, not the transport itself. The it collects all the necessary data.

entry.title: How to use value help when a field has over 200 statuses?
entry.content: I have a requirement to setup a report that needs a value help. however, this status field (ekbe-bwart) does not have an associated cds view and has over 200 options. What would be the best way to go about doing this?

entry.title: Re: Fiori & CAP: getting custom action working
entry.content:
hi Sandeep,

thanks for the short explanation. I have already read several times the page you have linked to your answer. This page is describing the situation of having a table and one or many rows are selected before a bound action is working. In this case, the context is delivered to the backend service call related to my action.

In my case, I like to have an action using the annotation-based approach with an input parameter to enter the title and bound to the entity which the complete object page is bound to. The term "bound" means in my case not the table which itself is completely bound to the object page as well. This case is not described in the Fiori docu. 

I was able to setup an unbound action with annotations, the action button will be displayed in the table toolbar. The expected popup dialog is shown if I press the action button and I can enter the title. After confirming the dialog close button, a CREATE request with the CAP action. But the CAP backend service is getting no context (I mean the bound entity) due to the fact that unbound actions never get a context as described in the Fiori docu.

My simple question is: is it possible to get the context (the bound entity) or alternatively, to have an input parameter containing at least the GUID from the underlying bound object page's entity  into the backend call so the CAP backend can use this GUID to select the context itself? Is this possible using the annotations? Or do I have to use the custom extensions in combination with manifest.json and do I have to write the complete dialog popup etc. on my own?

The only answer I know if I like to use the annotation based approach is to use global actions in the object page header. But I like to display the action button on the table toolbar insetad because the action button is for manipulations of all rows of this table and not of the entity which is bound to the complete object page.

 

Yours

Stephan

entry.title: Re: Call an OData Web API Service externally
entry.content:
Hi @junwu 

If by chance, you know. 

I'm trying to create a Destination in SAP BTP (to consume it in SAP BAS) , with the new address  without -web, Authentication is OAuth2ClientCredentials. I provide Token service URL, service id and client secret. But unfortunately, getting a 401 error.

entry.title: Re: Issue with address inconsistencies when synchronizing...
entry.content: Hi Marco, yes I found my issue! There were 2 entries for the same Pers. number in table PA0000. The first one didn't have end or start date, and with those fields blank, it gave me the error. We deleted that entry so it could use the second one with the correct data (and with the proper values in start and end date

entry.title: Re: How do we call SOLR externally with SSO enabled?
entry.content: Thank you again for your response. I will keep this ticket open in case I have any questions while we code this solution.

entry.title: Why add condition REA1 Rebate Accruals from Sales Condition Contract into an SD Order/Invoice
entry.content:
I've started in Condition Contract Management.  I believe I understand the delta accruals and settlement process.  I've created a condition contract with REA1 (Rebate Accrual) condition set to 5% and RES1 (Rebate) condition set to 5%.

In my hypothetical example I have $100 a month in sales, and my condition contract runs for a year from Jan to Dec.  I started the Condition Contract in March, so there was a delta accrual for the $200 sales that had already been in Jan and Feb is done (5% of the 2 months is $10).  I post a new sales invoice in March for $100 and can see business volume.

My question is, I've seen some clients put the REA1 condition in the billing document pricing proc as a statistical condition.  So in March there's a 5% rebate sitting the invoice (business volume).  I can see some sense if you are testing and want to see how much of a rebate/accrual you have (and if there are others hitting the sales invoice).  But this will impact performance.  Would there be other reasons (eg you don't run a delta accrual every month - but instead have the sales invoice document post to accruals)?  Also why set it up this way, if you have scales, or realise you have made a mistake in the rebate % half way through the year - then you will have to do more work to correct (or you would not have the scales working properly) - whereas the delta accrual process is better?

entry.title: Re: ABAP CERTIFICATION
entry.content:
Certification for ABAP  Cloud is here https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-associate-back-end-developer-abap-cloud#how-to-prepare

You can learn from : 

  • https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/acquire-core-abap-skills
  • https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/practicing-clean-core-extensibility-for-sap-s-4hana-cloud

Additionally You can learn from books which You can buy from SAP PRESS

  • https://www.sap-press.com/

Example test You can perform on this platform: 

  • https://www.erpprep.com/sap-cloud-solutions/c-abapd-2309-sap-abap-cloud-back-end-developer
  • https://www.udemy.com/courses/search/?src=ukw&q=C_ABAPD

entry.title: Re: Country of origin in invoice, pro-forma , etc
entry.content: Information for sales document type are determined by material master data, business partner data or from customer info record. Country of origin from purchasing info record is not taken to sales document types.

entry.title: Re: How to use value help when a field has over 200 statu...
entry.content:
@junwuthe cds code 

 

define view ZMSTATUS_VH as select distinct from ekbe as mt
{
  key mt.bwart as mstatus
}
group by mt.bwart

 

Displays as such:

 As you can see, not all the statuses are showing up as the values in the SAP system are such:

entry.title: How to access Purchase Requisition Personal Setting (ME52N) from custom dialog
entry.content:
I'm trying to display the dialog to maintain Purchase Requisition Personal Settings from a custom program, but only the tab which is about the default values.

Is it possible?

entry.title: Re: How to access Purchase Requisition Personal Setting (...
entry.content:
Below is a little snippet to obtain this dialog:

It's mostly derived from MEGUI_MAINTAIN function module (based on CL_FRAMEWORK_MM, CL_PERSONALIZATION_MM, CL_PROPOSER_MM, CL_ESDU_CONNECTOR_MM_2, etc.) Instead of calling the function module MEPERS_START_POPUP which was too much tricky, I used MEPERS_START_ITEM_PROP to start the popup.

REPORT.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 1001.
  PARAMETERS dummy.
SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 1001.

START-OF-SELECTION.
  cl_framework_mm=>get_instance( IMPORTING ex_instance = DATA(framework) ).

  " Class CL_PERSONALIZATION_MM
  DATA(personalization) = framework->get_personalization( ).

  " For the object type if_purchase_requisition=>c_objtyp = 'BUS2105' (Purchase Requisition), the
  " proposer class will be FUNCTION-POOL=MEPROP\CLASS=LCL_REQ_PROPOSER. You MUST indicate the
  " DDIC structure MEREQ_PROP which is hardcoded in LCL_REQ_PROPOSER.
  CONSTANTS po_doc TYPE mepo_mfs_application VALUE 'MMPUR_PO_DOC'. " From the constants in LMEGUICON
  DATA(l_proposer) = cl_proposer_mm=>create( im_objecttype      = EXACT #( if_purchase_requisition=>c_objtyp )
                                             im_structure       = 'MEREQ_PROP'           ##NO_TEXT
                                             im_mfs_application = po_doc
                                             im_postfix         = '_X' ).

  framework->add_proposer( im_objecttype = EXACT #( if_purchase_requisition=>c_objtyp )
                           im_proposer   = l_proposer ).
  personalization->append( im_name   = 'ReqProposer'          ##NO_TEXT
                           im_object = l_proposer ).
  DATA(esdus_stream) = NEW cl_esdus_connector_mm_2( im_action_id = 'PurchaseRequisition' ) ##NO_TEXT. " ESDUS-ACTION
  esdus_stream->if_reader_mm~read_root( personalization ).

  " Function module 'MEPERS_START_ITEM_PROP' must be called inside a screen sequence because
  " in l_popup->send() (CL_WINDOW_MM), there is "PERFORM set_screen IN PROGRAM (prog) USING old_dyn"
  " (PROG = '') which does a SET SCREEN and later, the end of program produces a short dump DYNPRO_NOT_FOUND.
  CALL SELECTION-SCREEN 1001.

  ASSERT 1 = 1.

AT SELECTION-SCREEN OUTPUT.
  IF sy-dynnr = '1001'.
    DATA(l_save) = EXACT mmpur_bool( abap_false ).
    CALL FUNCTION 'MEPERS_START_ITEM_PROP'
      EXPORTING im_objecttype = EXACT string40( if_purchase_requisition=>c_objtyp )
      IMPORTING ex_savesetup  = l_save.
    IF l_save = abap_true.
      " Transfer screen input to global data in function group of ES_SAVE_USER_SETTINGS.
      " This doesn't transfer "deletions" of 'PurchaseRequisition' personal settings which are not displayed.
      " Don't use ESDUS_STREAM->HANDLE_SAVE_REQUEST( ), which would delete them.
      esdus_stream->if_writer_mm~write_root( personalization ).
      CALL FUNCTION 'ES_SAVE_USER_SETTINGS'.
      COMMIT WORK.
    ENDIF.

    SUPPRESS DIALOG.
    LEAVE TO SCREEN 0.
  ENDIF.

NB: the saved data goes to the table ESDUS.

entry.title: Re: End routine logic not working with multiple record lo...
entry.content: You can easily debug and find the underlying reason. Seems with multiple record conditions are failing. I advise to run the DTP with multiple record and debug the code. You can set the watch point with desired variable value and then debug. I am sure this will make you understand where the code is failing.

entry.title: Re: SAP Standard Datasource Enhancement code select times.
entry.content: in RSA3, you can see the package size and package count. So Open cursor and corresponding select is executed one time for each package count.

entry.title: Re: BW Web Report Is not working in EDGE.
entry.content: Can you please check in RSRT, if you can execute the query in Java web or not?

However, the documentation is not adequately defined and there is no example of a body for the PATCH request.

Has anyone been able to find the correct specification?

Even if you "Try out" SAP forgot to update the API.

SAP Analytics Cloud API

entry.title: Re: Cascading picklist for Region of Birth
entry.content: How was this issue resolved ?

entry.title: Central Store-Based Provisioning: The Ultimate Solution for Application User Sync from IPS 🔁
entry.content:
Central store-based provisioning enables the automatic provisioning of application-specific groups from the Identity Directory to the target systems whenever changes occur. These changes include user assignments or modifications of group attributes.

Note

Currently, application-specific groups are supported for 

  • SAP Advanced Financial Closing
  • SAP Ariba Applications
  • SAP Analytics Cloud
  • SAP Application Server ABAP
  • SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management
  • SAP Sales Cloud and SAP Service Cloud
  • Microsoft Entra ID
  • Local Identity Directory provisioning systems

Create Application-Specific Groups or Assign Application-Specific Groups to existing Group

you can create application-specific groups in the Identity Directory of your SAP Cloud Identity Services tenant and provision them afterward to target systems of your choice.

Operating with application-specific groups by Identity Provisioning service requires having a source system with set property ips.application.id. By running provisioning jobs from such source system you can create, update, and delete application-specific groups in the Identity Directory of your SAP Cloud Identity Services tenant, depending on the values of their attributes.

Enable or Disable Central Store-Based Provisioning

You can enable or disable the Central Store-Based Provisioning option in the administration console for SAP Cloud Identity Services.

  • Under Applications and Resources, choose the Applications tile.
  • Choose the application that you want
  • Under the Provisioning tab, enable or disable the Central Store-Based Provisioning option
  • Once the application has been updated, the system displays the message Application <name of application> updated.

When you enable the Central Store-Based Provisioning for a specific application, whenever you update an application-specific group associated with this application, a provisioning of the updates is triggered, there is no need to run manual or scheduled jobs in the Identity Provisioning

IPS Transformation Changes

Select the relevant source system, open the Properties tab, choose Edit and add the property ips.application.id =6f187cce-2f51-4efd-9bf4-9a8aabdd1c9cMonitor Central Store Logs

Central Store Logs provide information about the application-specific groups that have been provisioned from the Identity Directory to your target systems.

Note

Central Store Logs are enabled and will appear under Provisioning Logs whenever changes to application-specific groups occur in the Identity Directory, such as assigning users or modifying group attributes.

 select your Identity Provisioning --->  Provisioning Logs --->  Central Store Logs

entry.title: Re: Split Settlement documents based on one Condition Con...
entry.content: hi victor, I would need your guidance for condition contract solution

entry.title: Re: Split Settlement documents based on one Condition Con...
entry.content: During partial settlement run, customer should get accrual amount as partial payment even if target is not achieved and it should get reversed when Final settlement is executed

entry.title: Consult where batches were used in multiple products at the same time
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a way to check which batches were used in the manufacture of a product while displaying multiple batches at the same time? (Something like using MB56 but for multiple batches simultaneously)

Thanks for the help!

entry.title: Urgent how DOCX(Xstring) is converted to PDF(Xstring)
entry.content:
can someone help how can I convert DOCX(Xstring)  to PDF(Xstring) as i want to attach it to VF03 transaction.I am getting DOCX(Xstring) i want it to convert to PDF(Xstring) and attach in the VF03 as PDF File. 

 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Urgent how DOCX(Xstring) is converted to PDF(Xstring)
entry.content:
Hi  @Mahanth 
To convert a DOCX (Xstring) to PDF (Xstring) in SAP and attach it to the VF03 transaction, please follow the steps
1) Use Function module : SCMS_DOC_READ to read the DOCX file into an Xstring.
2) write a custom code to DOCX to PDF (there must be some standard function module for this)
3) Use Function module ARCHIV_CONNECTION_INSERT to attach the PDF Xstring to the VF03 transaction.
code / sample

DATA: lv_docx_xstring TYPE xstring,
lv_pdf_xstring TYPE xstring.* Step 1: Read the DOCX file into an Xstring
CALL FUNCTION 'SCMS_DOC_READ'
EXPORTING
document_id = 'DOCX_DOCUMENT_ID'
IMPORTING
document = lv_docx_xstring.

* 2 ---- Custom code to Convert DOCX to PDF 
*--pass lv_docx_xstring to get lv_pdf_xstring
* 3 ---- Attach PDF to VF03
CALL FUNCTION 'ARCHIV_CONNECTION_INSERT'
EXPORTING
archiv_id = 'ARCHIVE_ID'
archiv_doc_id = 'PDF_DOCUMENT_ID'
archiv_doc_type = 'PDF'
archiv_doc_class = 'OT'
archiv_doc_size = xstrlen( lv_pdf_xstring )  "--from custom code / function module
IMPORTING
archiv_doc_id = 'PDF_DOCUMENT_ID'
TABLES
archiv_doc_data = lv_pdf_xstring.

Hope this helps. Cheers!

entry.title: Urgent how DOCX(Xstring) is converted to PDF(Xstring)
entry.content:
can someone help how can I convert DOCX(Xstring)  to PDF(Xstring) as i want to attach it to VF03 transaction.I am getting DOCX(Xstring) i want it to convert to PDF(Xstring) and attach in the VF03 as PDF File. 

 

Thanks in advance!

entry.content:
Hi @RemiKaimal  thanks for the reply as of now i have done my development to attach docx to VF03.but I want to know how we convert DOCX(Xstring)  to PDF(Xstring) as i want to convert it to PDF.i can't find any standard FM or it is possible or not.

Thanks,

Mahanth

entry.title: Re: Urgent how DOCX(Xstring) is converted to PDF(Xstring)
entry.content:
I found this function module : EXT_CONVERT_DOCX_TO_PDF
pass your i_docx_xstring to get lv_pdf_xstring, should work

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Connection
entry.content:
Dpagent vs Cloud conector.

SAP DPAgent (Data Provisioning Agent) and SAP Cloud Connector are both used to facilitate secure communication between on-premise systems and SAP cloud environments, but they serve different purposes and are used in different contexts.

SAP DPAgent (Data Provisioning Agent)
- Purpose. SAP DPAgent is primarily used for data replication and real-time data access between on-premise systems and SAP cloud solutions like SAP HANA Cloud or SAP Data Intelligence.
- Functionality: It enables data provisioning by connecting on-premise data sources (such as SAP ERP, SAP S/4HANA, or other databases) to the cloud. It supports real-time data replication and can be used for scenarios like data federation, where data is accessed in real-time without being physically moved.
- Use Cases**: Commonly used in scenarios requiring real-time data integration, such as SAP HANA Smart Data Integration (SDI) or SAP Data Intelligence.

SAP Cloud Connector
- Purpose**: SAP Cloud Connector acts as a secure link between on-premise systems and SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) or other SAP cloud applications like SAP S/4HANA Cloud or SAP SuccessFactors.
- Functionality**: It provides a secure tunnel for communication, ensuring that only authorized cloud applications can access on-premise systems. It handles authentication, encryption, and connectivity, enabling seamless integration between on-premise and cloud environments.
- Use Cases**: Used for integrating on-premise systems with SAP cloud applications, such as SAP BTP, SAP S/4HANA Cloud, or SAP SuccessFactors. It is also used in scenarios like SAP Cloud Integration (CPI) for connecting to on-premise systems.

 Key Differences
1. **Primary Use**:
- DPAgent: Focuses on data replication and real-time data access.
- Cloud Connector: Focuses on secure connectivity and integration between on-premise and cloud applications.

2. ntegration Scenarios**:
- DPAgent: Used for data provisioning and real-time data integration.
- Cloud Connector: Used for application integration and secure communication.

3. Supported Systems**:
- DPAgent: Connects to on-premise data sources for data replication.
- Cloud Connector: Connects to on-premise systems for application-level integration.

4. Deployment Context**:
- DPAgent: Typically used in data-centric scenarios like SAP HANA Cloud or SAP Data Intelligence.
- Cloud Connector: Used in application-centric scenarios like SAP BTP or SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

In summary, SAP DPAgent is more focused on data integration and replication, while SAP Cloud Connector is designed for secure application integration between on-premise and cloud environments.

entry.title: Hi Experts i am trying to manipulate shelf life expiration date from badi VB_SLED_MANAGEMENT
entry.content:
But when i am putting debugged IF_EX_VB_SLED_MANAGEMENT~MAINTAIN_SLED_PARAMETERS but its not triggering from MSC1/2/3n or from migo and when i do a where used list on VB_SLED_MANAGEMENT i am not getting any result in hana system. Can someone please help me to understand how to trigger debugging for this it will be of great help.

As i see this badi is there in the official sap help document for sled determnation for batch.

entry.title: Sydney Stammtisch Recap 2502
entry.content:
The Shelbourne Hotel Rooftop was another new venue for #SAPStammtischSYD and we had big crowd come to check it out. Thanks to everyone who came!

It was a sunny day but very humid (as it usually is in Sydney in February). At first I was disappointed that our tables weren't directly under the retractable roof, but then I realised that our space was air conditioned and much more clement.

I couldn't really count numbers precisely but I would estimate we had a record crowd, probably over 40 people.

I'm thinking we will need to plan further ahead for future events, as we really need a large space reserved for us.  Most likely the next event will be on a Thursday in May.

Perhaps we should return to The Orient Hotel? Thursday seems to be the most popular night...would you agree?  Or is there a new venue we should try?  Let us know in the comments below

Thanks to @jeff_t for the last 6 photos below. Feel free to add photos in the comments

entry.title: SAP BTP Trial invitation e-mails
entry.content:
I recently signed up for a BTP trial.

When I try to add users (under sub-account -> Security -> Users) none of them get an invitation email. There are no errors or warnings. I tried to see if associating the users with a Role Collection has any impact, but it doesn't.

Since this is a basic functionality I wonder if I am missing some basic config somewhere.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Vendor field is not getting the value at the time of...
entry.content: I have worked with SAP to find the solution. At this level based on your screenshot i can say, please check the Partitioned data of the supplier in Ariba Buying&Invoicing. The vendor doesn't populate in these documents if Partitioned data is missing.

entry.title: Re: How to download/extract custom Fiori app source code...
entry.content:
Besides the Tcode /UI5/UI5_REPOSITORY_LOAD
You can also use ABAPGit:
If you have ABAPGit installed, you can use it to export the source code to a Git repository
Hope this helps
Cheers!

entry.title: Re: SAP Aerospace and Defense Best practice activation in S/4 Hana 2022

Hi @Williams43 
please use Best practices explorer  : Process Navigator - SAP for Me
more 
SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA published! - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Hi Experts i am trying to manipulate shelf life expir...
entry.content:
Hey, 

normally it sits in  Programm: SAPMM07M. 

But if debugger wont open it could you check if its the correct one for you? 

Maybe try to check if you are running this badi with your user or you might have to debugg for an external user. 

If you are triggering the programm with an message you have to debugg with RSNAST00. 
If its done via Job you could try /jdbg  for planned job to debug from there. 
Hope that helps

entry.title: BOMMAT: how to control if the previous idoc is not successfully , next idoc run will be error
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are using BOMMAT to migrate the ECN BOM from ECC to S4.  we are using sterilization no to process the idoc of same material + plant + Usage+ alternative no. 

the problem is : now system behavior is ， even the second IDoc of the bom processing is error. but the next idoc no. is still running with successful status 53.  this will cause the bom data is inconsistent . 

Any standard configuration or control set can archive my requirement? 

#BOM

thank you all.

entry.title: Re: BOMMAT: how to control if the previous idoc is not successfully , next idoc run will be error
entry.content: serialization no. can only control the processing sequence. but cannot block the next idoc processing , it is not dependent on previous idoc status

entry.title: Re: How to Implement Production in Default SAP Business one
entry.content:
Detailed Approach!

I am facing one problem in receipt of production; i want experts help to sort out the issue i will share screenshots 

i suppose to receive only 395 pcs, but i added mistakenly quantity was 1210 pcs

for 1210 pcs 2 raw material required

1st raw material required - 404 pcs but only 294.5 pcs stock
2nd raw material required - 15 pcs

so difference is posted in variance in summary tab i dont know how to adjust it.

entry.title: Re: Outbound delivery is not getting distributed to EWM
entry.content: any solution?

entry.title: Re: Hi Experts i am trying to manipulate shelf life expir...
entry.content: Check OMJ5 if it is active for your Plant or moving type

entry.title: Re: Hi Experts i am trying to manipulate shelf life expiration date from badi VB_SLED_MANAGEMENT
entry.content:
Did you make sure that your BAdI implementation and class are both activated? Did you make sure that you're in the conditions to call this BAdI? NB: the where-used list provided by SAP is well known to be incomplete since ABAP 6.10 - R/3 4.70, as explained in https://me.sap.com/notes/401389.

EDIT: if you still can't debug it, as said in the answer, you may reverse engineer SAPMM07M to see which subroutines are calling the BAdI and debug them to identify which one of the conditions are not fulfilled.

entry.title: DWS class grouping
entry.content:
The "hourly" and "salaried" employees of a manufacturing unit which share the same planned working times (9 to 6) have only one difference - overtime calculation rule (5% and 10%)

1) In this case, do we have two Daily work schedules and assign two different DWS classes?

OR

2) do we create a single DWS with a single DWS class and handle this scenario in PCRs?

@vianshu @sikindar_a

entry.title: Re: How to remove the header that automatically added to...
entry.content:
You can use the URL Parameter:

sap-ushell-config=headerless

But I think you try to build a navigation inside your app. I would suggest to decompose your app and let the launchpad take over the navigation part.

entry.title: what is the released badi for warehouse order sorting in the public cloud system

entry.title: Guide to Mass Uploading Product Master in EWM using Warehouse Monitor & /SCWM/MIG_PRODUCT
entry.content:
In this document, I will explain how to mass upload the product master in the SAP EWM system within S4HANA using the warehouse monitor and /SCWM/MIG_PRODUCT.

When you create a material using the MM01 transaction, your master data will automatically transfer to the EWM system due to the embedded connection.

For example, if you create the material MAT200 in MM01, you can see the material data created in ERP tables such as MARA, MARD, and MARC.However, if you attempt to view the same data in the T code /SCWM/MAT1(warehouse level), you will encounter an error. This occurs because the material created in MM01 means that the global data of the material has been established, making it accessible for all SAP modules such as EWM, TM, MDG, etc. This is a functionality of the embedded system.In the transaction code /SAPAPO/MAT1, you can view all basic global-level data created in the ERP system.Now, we will focus on extending product data with the warehouse view in the EWM system.

To accomplish this, we will use the transaction code /SCWM/MAT1, which allows us to extend both the warehouse view of the product and specific storage types.

It's important to note the following:

- Your warehouse view data will be stored in the database table /SAPAPO/MATLWH ( not a product as a direct entry, pass MATNR to /SAPAPO/MATKEY and get the MATID then pass here).

- Data related to warehouse storage types will be stored in the database table /SAPAPO/MATLWHST.

Here is an example of this,

I have maintained the warehouse data but not the storage-type data. Now let's see how it appears on the tables.Mass upload product master in S4 HANA EWM:

Mass uploading of the product master in EWM means extending the warehouse view/storage type view for materials that have already been created in MM01 within ERP. Therefore, it is essential that the material master is created prior to performing the mass extension of the product master.

I have created the following material in MM01 (in ERP), and there is no warehouse data maintained yet.We can check the list of products that do not have maintained warehouse data in the warehouse monitor belowMass upload/extend using -/SCWM/MIG_PRODUCT:

Refer the SAP KBA – “2602348 - Tools for Batch Warehouse Product Maintenance in S/4Hana embedded EWM”

In the KBA above, SAP explained how to use /SCWM/MIG_PRODUCT, and a sample file is also attached to the note. We can download the file named "scwm_mig_product_template_NEW.xlsx" and fill in our product master details there.

Below is the screenshot of the filled data from the file, and I converted this file to a .CSV format when saving it on the local drive.Execute /SCWM/MIG_PRODUCTAfter executing, we are getting the below error,The error occurs because we have not selected a field separator on the selection screen. If the field separator is not chosen, the system will not be able to read the spreadsheet data correctly. Therefore, ensure that the field separator is set to a comma (,) on the initial screen.

Now, let's fill in the fields and execute the process again.After executing the process again, we can now see that everything is green and there are no errors.We can check the extended product details in the warehouse monitor as below,Product Master extension using warehouse monitor:

Additionally, we can extend the product master using the warehouse monitor, and below we will test that functionality with the test case.

Please refer SAP KBA-“2627825 - Mass Creation of Warehouse Products from Monitor” & “2602348 - Tools for Batch Warehouse Product Maintenance in S/4Hana embedded EWM”In the screenshot below, we can see that the product is created in MM01, but the warehouse data is not extended.Follow the steps below to extend it,We have filled in the following details, which will apply to all the items selected on the previous screen. However, please note that this means all the selected products will have the same data entered here. If you need different data for specific items, those materials must be processed separately.The warehouse data for the materials has now been created.In the same way, we can maintain the storage type data and follow the screenshots for extending the storage type data view for the products.Enter the storage type where you will extend the product in the selection screen,Now, storage-type data is also maintained for the product.

Note:

We can use the warehouse monitor to make mass changes to warehouse products. If a product is already extended, the system will apply the changes based on the data provided. However, if the product is not extended in EWM, the monitor will create/extend the product according to the given data.

Ref:

2627825 - Mass Creation of Warehouse Products from Monitor

2602348 - Tools for Batch Warehouse Product Maintenance in S/4Hana embedded EWM

All data and screenshots in this documentation originate from the SAP S/4HANA 2023 demo system. This system is configured for training, testing, and demonstration purposes only and is not connected to any production environment. Any similarity to actual business data, entities, or individuals is purely coincidental.

Best Regards,

Kannan Chokkanathan

Pradeep

entry.title: Refresh Object Page after Action Execution with Custom Entity
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am using the RAP Model with a Custom Entity and have implemented an Unmanaged Behavior Definition. I want to refresh the Object Page after executing an action.

However, since the Custom Entity does not have a projection, I cannot use the "use side effects" syntax in the projection. I have tried using "side effects affect ..." but the Object Page does not refresh.

Is there any way to refresh the Object Page when using a Custom Entity in RAP?

Thank a lot.

entry.title: Sao analytics cloud - deleting version data using data action
entry.content:
hi all,

i need to allow my planning users to delete records from the planning budget version, this sometimes a neccessity because the budget changes and new budget is being uploaded,

i created a data action using the advanced forumla editor and i came across a problem, i'm unable to select a version to run this data action on, it's not even showing in the filters on the visual editor. What can i do?
